title: BlueBlocksMC
description: A simple and clean resource pack, formerly BlueBlocksCraft.
body:
BlueBlocksCraft is a simple resource pack.

Now has 3D models for many blocks and items!
Such as: Tools, flowers, rails, pumpkin and melon, and more!

For 1.14~1.19.4, use the 1.16 version from the github source. most things would work well. However It's WIP, still a lot of things without custom textures and models.

1.20+ is broken for now, it needs tweaks of the pack structure.

3.x supports MC1.12+. MC1.9~1.11.2 is no longer supported but still usable(use 1.12.2 version instead, may have minor bugs)

2.x supports MC1.6~1.7.10 and is no longer supported.

Screenshots(Partial): 
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JxjSKetO/images/62eeb2d0036c75b40e663bd5bbb6b4107d096781.png)
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JxjSKetO/images/0a78b2a214e325006540b62356c39bca94aa42db.png)
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JxjSKetO/images/85ed2dd99228487a77afbd165d86b2a11ef1040b.png)
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JxjSKetO/images/24899c6c1c4ab4225160bdab3c1c8bdc7dfc1dd6.png)
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JxjSKetO/images/7232f9228688c0359ecd6bb2effe5e77700b39cb.png)
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JxjSKetO/images/975432f00aa44d248727afea8d1ac0126543d399.png)

Supports CTM and emissive textures. Optifine or equivalent mods needed for these features.

Minecraft Forum post(English):https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/resource-packs/2917555-1-9-1-13-16x-blueblockscraft-not-just-simple

MCBBS post(Chinese):http://www.mcbbs.net/thread-809999-1-1.html

Github(You can get developing versions here):https://github.com/Blue-Beaker/BlueBlocksCraft_Vanilla

Gitee(Mirrored from Github, but faster for Chinese users):https://gitee.com/blue-beaker/BlueBlocksCraft_Vanilla

 Curseforge: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/blueblockscraft

You may also need these packs:

BlueBlocksTFoundation (Pack for Thermal Foundation)

BlueBlocksArsenal (Pack for Redstone Arsenal)
